name: voice-pr
description: Speak feedback at your GitHub PR while a Cursor agent pre-warms, then turn the anchored recording into tested commits with minimal post-recording latency.

scripts.check: bash -n scripts/daemon.sh scripts/run-daemon.sh && node --check server.js && node --check scripts/serve.js && node --check scripts/trace.js && node --check extension/anchors.js && node --check extension/recovery.js && node --check extension/hub.js && node --check extension/timer.js && node --check extension/authorization.js && node --check extension/receipt.js && node --check extension/content.js && node --check extension/background.js && node --check extension/gaze.js && node --check lib/action-framework.js && node --check lib/action-store.js && node --check lib/agent.js && node --check lib/archive.js && node --check lib/exec.js && node --check lib/github.js && node --check lib/prompt.js && node --check lib/pipeline.js && node --check lib/transcribe.js && node --check lib/trace.js && npm test
